subject: Physics
title: The Big Freeze
description: A fast breakdown of The Big Freeze for builders.

hook.text: If dark energy keeps pushing, the universe will expand forever, cool down, and end in eternal frozen darkness.

buildup.text: Stars will burn through their fuel over trillions of years. The last red dwarfs will flicker out.

discovery.text: Black holes will evaporate via Hawking radiation over timescales of 10^67 to 10^100 years.

twist.text: Eventually, even protons may decay. The universe becomes a sparse soup of particles drifting apart forever.

climax.text: The Big Freeze is the most widely accepted fate—not dramatic, just infinite cold silence.

punchline.text: Stars die. Black holes evaporate. Silence forever. The Big Freeze.

quiz.question: What is the Big Freeze scenario?
options: The universe expands forever, cools down, and all energy dissipates
The universe freezes solid into a single crystal
A new ice age engulfs all planets
